forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 54. Southwest wind around 6 mph.

forecast.name: Wednesday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny. High near 77, with temperatures falling to around 73 in the afternoon. Southwest wind 5 to 10 mph.

weather_report:
As night softly turns to dawn, Downtown San Francisco awakens to a mostly clear sky, a gentle breeze whispering hopes of a pleasant day ahead. The air is crisp and carries the promise of warmth, with temperatures set to rise, perfect for those who cherish the embrace of sunshine. Morning mist has receded, revealing the city’s stunning architecture amidst a backdrop of serene blue, while the iconic Golden Gate Bridge stands resolute, free from fog’s familiar touch. 

As you prepare for the day, lightweight layers are your allies; a light jacket over a comfortable tee will balance the mild temperatures. The bustling energy of the city beckons you toward modest adventures—perhaps a stroll through one of the city’s beloved parks, where verdant grass and blooming flowers invite moments of reflection, or a visit to a local café, where the aroma of freshly brewed coffee mingles with the sounds of laughter and chatter. With the day still young and skies clear, it’s an ideal time to embrace the essence of urban life, savoring the rich tapestry that is San Francisco.
